description_long: This alcohol shop is a compact, modern kiosk-style building with a flat, light wood roof bordered by a black trim. The front facade features a large glass window and a prominent black sign with illuminated gold lettering reading 'BATCH & BOTTLE.' The exterior walls are finished in a smooth, light gray material, giving the structure a clean and contemporary appearance. The interior, visible through the front window, includes a counter and shelving, suggesting a functional retail space. The sides and rear of the building are mostly solid, with some upper window panels providing additional light. The overall design is minimalistic, with a focus on geometric lines and practical retail presentation.
description: A modern, kiosk-style alcohol shop with a flat wood roof, large front window, and illuminated 'BATCH & BOTTLE' signage. The exterior is sleek and minimalistic, with light gray walls and black trim.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large glass window, interior counter, and illuminated 'BATCH & BOTTLE' sign.
description_view_1: Side view with upper window panels and solid lower wall, sign edge visible.
description_view_2: Rear view with a completely solid light gray wall and the wood roof.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with upper window panels and solid lower wall, no signage visible.
attribute_storefront_signage: A black rectangular sign with illuminated gold text reading 'BATCH & BOTTLE' is mounted to the right of the main window, projecting outward from the facade. The sign is sleek, modern, and visually prominent.
attribute_architectural_style: Modern minimalist with clean lines, flat roof, large glass window, and a simple geometric form. The use of black trim and light gray walls emphasizes a contemporary urban aesthetic.
